biography: Grace Caroline Currey (born July 17, 1996) is an American actress, best known for playing Young Melinda Gordon on Ghost Whisperer, Haley Farrel in Bones, and Young Natalie Wood in The Mystery of Natalie Wood. She also played the character Sydney Briggs in Home of the Brave. She starred in the television film Back When We Were Grownups, playing Young Biddy.
name: Grace Caroline Currey
